race.comment: COSMIC FORTUNE (9) missed the kick which made life difficult last time out over 1006m at Grafton. Very fit mare who races well here and the step up in distance has come at the right time. Happy to have her on top in a tricky little race. Veteran CABSAV (1) showed a glimpse of form at his latest outing when runner-up in a BM66 over a similar trip to this at Lismore. Has never won a race without Luke Rolls aboard and he is back in the saddle today. Poses a genuine threat. IT'SALLSAIDANDONE (7) led but ran out of steam at the end of 1420m at Lismore last start. Better placed back to this trip and should give backers a sight. AUREATE (6) returned in good order last time and is in the mix. SEA OF QI (4) found five furlongs a bit slick first-up at Grafton. On an eight-day back-up and out to a more suitable journey so expect a bit more this afternoon.
